summary: This set of interfaces allow a smart contract to save an SVG image in Ethereum and to retrieve an SVG image from Ethereum for fungible tokens, non-fungible tokens and tokens based on standards that will be developed in the future. The interface set has two interfaces: one to save an SVG file in Ethereum and the other to retrieve an SVG file from Ethereum. Typical applications include but not limited to: * A solution for storage of a fungible token's icon. * A solution for storage of a non-fungible token's icon. * A solution for storage of the icon/logo of a DAO's reputation token.
title: Saving and Displaying Image Onchain for Universal Tokens
